title: missing ';' when convert single line systemverilog queue operation into c++

features.name: queue pop_front in single-line if block
features.description: Code should include a queue pop_front() call wrapped in void'() and placed inside an if block with only one statement
features.snippet:
ar_t ar_queue[$];
always @(negedge clk) if (pop_en) void'(ar_queue.pop_front());

features.name: queue push_back in single-line if block
features.description: Code should include a queue push_back() call placed inside an if block with only one statement
features.snippet:
ar_t ar_queue[$];
always @(negedge clk) if (push_en) ar_queue.push_back(ar);

features.name: packed struct as queue element type
features.description: Code should include a packed struct typedef used as element type for a queue
features.snippet:
typedef struct packed { logic [31:0] araddr; logic [7:0] arid; logic [7:0] arlen; } ar_t;
ar_t ar_queue[$];
